_comment: All knobs for one backtest run. Pessimistic by design — see README.

yahoo._note: FREE futures/stock price bars. 5m -> ~60 days history; 1m -> ~7 days; 1d -> years. So intraday futures backtests only cover the recent weeks Yahoo serves. Symbols: ES=F, NQ=F, MES=F, MNQ=F.

polygon._note: Set POLYGON_API_KEY as an environment variable (do NOT paste the key here / into git). Needs an Options tier that includes QUOTES (NBBO). No historical greeks on Polygon, so use contract_selection='nearest_atm'.

thetadata._note: Theta Terminal v3 on port 25503 (/v3 REST). Must be running + logged in. On a STANDARD options / FREE stock tier the engine reconstructs the intraday underlying from option quotes via put-call parity (no stock feed).

local._note: Files must match the normalized schema in src/schema.py.

strategy.name: orb_breakout_calls
strategy._type_note: long_call = the ORB buy-calls strategy (loses after costs). put_credit_spread = SELL a defined-risk put spread (collect premium, theta works for you).
strategy._pcs_note: Put credit spread: at entry_time, SELL a put ~short_otm_pct below price, BUY one spread_width lower. Take profit at tp_pct_of_credit% of the credit; stop if loss hits stop_mult_of_credit x credit; else hold to expiry (settles at intrinsic). Bullish bias — pairs with trend_filter=above_sma.
strategy._delta_note: target_delta only used when contract_selection='target_delta' (needs a feed WITH historical greeks, e.g. ThetaData). Polygon has none -> use nearest_atm.
strategy._trend_filter_note: Only take the long breakout when the day is bullish. 'above_open' = underlying above the day's open; 'above_sma' = above the N-bar average.
strategy._allowed_sessions_note: Restrict entries by time of day. e.g. ["open"] = only 09:30-10:30. All four = no restriction.
strategy._take_profit_note: null = let winners run (swing exits on trend_break/stop). For options ~15-40; intraday futures 0.3-0.8; daily swing maybe 8-15 if used.

futures._note: Economics for futures_orb. ES=F: point_value 50, tick 0.25. Micro MES=F: point_value 5. NQ=F: 20 (MNQ=F: 2). slippage_ticks = ticks of slippage assumed each side (futures spreads are ~1 tick).
